USA.label: Pre-Election
USA.summary: Voter registration opens, candidates declare their intent, and primary elections are held to select party nominees.

USA.label: Campaign Phase
USA.summary: Candidates travel, hold rallies, debate, and use media to share their platforms and win voter support.

India.label: Announcement & Code of Conduct
India.summary: The Election Commission of India (ECI) announces the schedule, and the Model Code of Conduct comes into effect immediately.
steps: Enforcement of Model Code of Conduct
